prompts.title: 西班牙 GRWM 晨间美妆缩略图
prompts.prompt: vertical 9:16 TikTok-style GRWM beauty thumbnail set in a warm, sunlit Mediterranean-inspired bedroom. A stylish young woman with {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} hair in a messy curly updo sits at a marble vanity, leaning forward with one arm folded and the other hand applying lip balm or lipstick to her mouth. Her face is covered by a centered rectangular blur block for privacy, but the rest of her styling is elegant and natural: tan glowing skin, delicate gold necklace with a small round pendant, thin gold bracelet, stacked gold rings, and a white lace camisole with thin straps. In the foreground on the vanity are exactly 7 visible beauty objects: 1 round tabletop vanity mirror on the left, 1 cup holding 5 makeup brushes, 1 clear glass dropper bottle, 1 tall white pump skincare bottle, 1 small black dropper bottle, 1 beige rounded cosmetic sponge or puff, and 1 pale green squeeze tube on the right. The background shows a softly blurred cozy bedroom with 1 arched window on the left, 1 leafy potted plant, 1 bed with white bedding and a mustard accent pillow, exposed wooden ceiling detail, and 1 framed landscape painting on the wall. Use golden-hour sunlight streaming from the left, soft shadows, creamy skin tones, shallow depth of field, luxury lifestyle editorial photography, intimate self-care mood, polished but natural composition. Add bold playful Spanish headline text in the upper left in three stacked lines reading {argument name="headline text" default="Mi rutina de belleza matutina"}, with each line large and rounded, white outline and soft drop shadow, using pastel colors: first line white, second line pink, third line pale yellow. Add 3 pink doodle accent strokes above the headline, 1 curved pink underline-swoosh beneath it, and 1 small yellow sun icon to the right of the last line. Place a clean white {argument name="brand text" default="Pollo.ai"} logo in the upper right. High-end influencer thumbnail aesthetic, crisp product focus in foreground, warm inviting lifestyle scene.

prompts.title: 个人资料/头像 - 创作者锁屏壁纸
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a vertical smartphone lock-screen wallpaper themed around a creator/AI productivity influencer, with an iPhone-style interface over a bright blue sky and clouds background.

Canvas: 9:16 vertical mobile wallpaper, realistic high-resolution composite, designed to look like a phone lock screen screenshot. Use a vivid daytime sky background with fluffy white clouds around the edges and a clear blue center.

Main subject: Place one full-body young male creator in the center, shot from a dramatic low angle as if standing above the viewer. He wears a dark charcoal sweatshirt, dark joggers, sneakers, a thin chain necklace, and a smartwatch. His pose is confident, one hand making a peace sign and the other in his pocket. Add a hand-drawn yellow dashed outline following his body silhouette. Use {argument name="creator handle" default="@umesh_ai"} as the social handle shown in the design. Keep the face anonymized or softly blurred if needed.

Lock-screen UI: At the top, show carrier text “Vi India” on the left, a black Dynamic Island pill with a small lock icon in the center, and signal, Wi‑Fi, and battery “92” on the right. Below it, show the date “Saturday, May 16” and a very large elegant serif time reading {argument name="lock screen time" default="09:41"}. On the left under the time, show weather: a partly cloudy icon, “28°”, “Partly Cloudy”, and “H:31° L:22°”. At the bottom, show two circular lock-screen buttons: flashlight on the left and camera on the right, plus the text “Swipe up to unlock” above the home indicator.

Floating creator elements: Include exactly 8 small chibi-style mini avatars of the same creator around the main figure, all with matching red hoodie and dark hair, faces anonymized if needed. Count and positions: 1 left upper holding a video camera, 1 left middle holding a takeaway coffee cup, 1 left lower holding a sign with “@umesh_ai”, 1 left bottom holding a smartphone, 1 right upper flying with white wings, 1 right middle holding a camera rig, 1 right lower sitting with a laptop, and 1 far right bottom presenting beside a whiteboard.

Analytics and creator graphics: Add exactly 4 data/creator panels: 1 translucent card labeled “Subscribers” with “104.7K” and “+12.5%”, 1 translucent card labeled “Engagement” with “83.6%” and “+8.1%”, 1 bottom-right whiteboard labeled “AI • Content • Data” with bar chart and pie chart, and 1 lower-left partial chart card showing a rising bar chart. Add hand-drawn white doodles around the subject: arrows, paper planes, stars, x marks, dashed motion trails, a chat bubble, and the handwritten words “FOCUS”, “CREATE”, “AI”, and “CONTENT”. Keep the doodles airy and sketch-like, not cluttered.

Notifications: Include exactly 2 rounded translucent notification banners near the lower third. First notification: black X app icon, title “X”, time “2m ago”, and message “@umesh_ai just posted: Building in public. Sharing the journey.” Second notification: red YouTube icon, title “New Content Idea”, time “12m ago”, and message ““5 AI Tools That 10x Your Productivity” is trending now. Don’t miss it!” Use {argument name="content idea text" default="5 AI Tools That 10x Your Productivity"} for the quoted title.

Visual style: Bright, polished, viral social-media wallpaper aesthetic; realistic central subject mixed with cute 3D chibi avatars, semi-transparent iOS glassmorphism panels, crisp typography, white doodle overlays, and high contrast against the blue sky. Make it energetic, motivational, and creator-economy themed. Avoid extra watermarks or unrelated text.
tags: 个人资料 / 头像 - 创作者锁屏壁纸

prompts.title: 战国 vs 三国跨界海报
prompts.prompt:
一张极具戏剧性、超精细的竖版动漫主视觉海报，展示了日本战国时代与中国三国时代之间的跨界战争，画面被一道发光的垂直光束精确地从中间一分为二。左半部分以深红、洋红、余烬橙和樱花粉为主题，代表 {argument name="left faction title" default="日本战国"}；右半部分以翡翠绿、青色、蓝绿色、金色和风暴蓝为主题，代表 {argument name="right faction title" default="中国三国"}。画面中央，巨大的垂直日文书法写着 {argument name="center slogan" default="时空交错，宿命碰撞。"}。构图紧凑、充满电影感且对称，如同高端游戏或电影的跨界海报，伴有无数火花、花瓣、发光粒子、动态光影以及层叠的背景建筑。

在左侧，描绘 4 位风格鲜明的战国主题武士。左上方，一位神情严峻的武士大名，身着饰有金边的华丽黑红铠甲，长发高束，随风飘动，以强有力的上半身肖像面向内侧；身后是樱花、旗帜和点缀着霓虹洋红色高光的层叠日式城堡。左中部，展示 1 位久经沙场、银发狂野、身着厚重层叠铠甲且目光凶狠的老将，半隐于堡垒城市景观中。左下方，展示 1 位身着深红铠甲、向前突刺的勇猛武士，衣摆飞扬，头戴鹿角状头盔，铠甲呈现动态的红黑配色。左下角前景，展示 1 位身着恶魔武士铠甲、头戴新月形头盔饰物、双眼闪烁红光的霸气剑客，斜握武士刀，周围环绕着余烬与花瓣。左上边缘附近的垂直旗帜上显示日文文本“日本战国”。

在右侧，描绘 4 位风格鲜明的三国主题英雄。右上方，展示 1 位身着精致蓝黑金配色礼仪铠甲、头戴高冠的尊贵战略家/帝王形象，以半身侧面像面向内侧；身后升起一条由水、云和光构成的发光灵龙。右中部，展示 1 位长须绿袍、头戴高冠、身着札甲的将军，神情庄重英勇，背景是霓虹灯点缀的城市建筑和旋转的魔法能量。右中下方，展示 1 位手持羽扇、身着层叠长袍并佩戴金饰的优雅谋士，神态冷静且深谋远虑。右下边缘，展示 1 位表情凶猛、发丝飞扬的咆哮武将。右下角前景，将一位身着绿金铠甲的英雄作为核心人物，他向观众伸出闪烁着翡翠绿光芒的宝剑，长袍飘逸，发光的能量丝带缠绕在剑刃周围。右上边缘附近的垂直旗帜上显示中文文本“中国三国”。

将东亚历史战争美学与未来派赛博朋克大都市元素融合：左侧是日式宝塔和堡垒，两侧均有霓虹摩天大楼和闪烁的城市灯光，天空中可见飞行堡垒的剪影和远处的空中战舰，上方则是魔法闪电、烟雾和风暴云。天空颜色从左侧的日落紫红过渡到右侧的风暴青绿色和银色。采用超精细的绘画风动漫插画，展现复杂的铠甲纹理、金属反射、体积光、高对比度、史诗般的规模和强烈的氛围。

在底部，添加巨大的风格化标题字体：左侧是巨大的火红色汉字“战国”，下方标注罗马音“SENGOKU”；中间是金属质感的金色“VS”；右侧是巨大的翡翠色发光汉字“三国”，下方标注罗马音“SANGOKU”。在下方，添加一行较小的居中副标题“SENGOKU VS SANGOKU”，并在其下方添加日文标语：{argument name="bottom tagline" default="跨越时空，英雄们的战斗即将开始。"}。海报布局，精致的商业宣传艺术，细节极其丰富，视觉冲击力强，具有收藏级的海报美感。

prompts.title: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 暖色示意图设计系统板
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a warm, sophisticated schematic-aesthetic design systems mood board for {argument name="theme" default="friendly AI interface design"}, combining technical diagrams, vintage paper textures, and subtle futuristic UI symbols.

Canvas: Wide horizontal image, approximately 16:9, with a dark charcoal background and a centered 2-row by 3-column grid of six rectangular panels separated by thick black gutters. The overall mood is warm, archival, precise, and slightly mysterious, like a design-system exploration wall.

Layout: Use exactly 6 panels:
1. Top-left panel: dark navy/black technical blueprint with an orbital spiral or galaxy-like contour diagram, fine cyan linework, small glowing amber dots, vertical measuring lines, tiny unreadable annotations, and a small boxed icon near the bottom right.
2. Top-middle panel: cream paper schematic of a cute rounded robot face, made from layered rounded-rectangle contour lines, two teal dot eyes, a small peach smile, vertical and horizontal construction lines, small crosshair marks, and faint measurement notations.
3. Top-right panel: warm beige abstract architectural flight-path schematic with sweeping teal and gray arcs, angular line structures, fine grid lines, crosshairs, orange glow points, and tiny technical labels.
4. Bottom-left panel: aged spiral-bound notebook page with paper tape on the corners, circular radar charts, geometric construction diagrams, small UI glyphs, a peach smiley sticker in the upper right, a small card near the bottom left, and a red hexagonal stamp near the bottom right.
5. Bottom-middle panel: misty futuristic architectural landscape or plaza in muted teal and tan, overlaid with perspective grids, fine UI measurement lines, subtle orange highlights, and translucent schematic annotations.
6. Bottom-right panel: dark charcoal icon-system sheet containing exactly 54 small geometric UI glyphs arranged in a clean grid, using thin teal, peach, and beige lines; include circles, sliders, crosshairs, brackets, arrows, nodes, target symbols, grids, and abstract interface controls.

Visual style: Warm take on technical schematics; combine Bauhaus-like precision, mid-century information design, old engineering drawings, soft futuristic interface graphics, and tactile analog materials. Use muted colors: charcoal black, faded cream, parchment beige, dusty teal, pale cyan, peach, amber, and soft gray. Lines should be extremely fine and precise, with subtle glow only on small highlights. Add paper grain, scan texture, faint speckles, worn edges, and layered transparent drafting marks.

Text and marks: Include tiny pseudo-technical annotations and measurement ticks, but keep all text mostly illegible and decorative. Avoid large readable headlines. Use minimal symbols such as plus signs, crosshairs, coordinates, micro labels, and tiny rule marks.

Constraints: No people, no photorealistic objects except paper/notebook texture, no logos, no watermark, no extra panels beyond the 6 specified panels. Maintain a polished design-system exploration feel rather than a chaotic collage.
tags: 信息图 / 教育视觉 - 暖色示意图设计系统板

prompts.title: 超现实章鱼汉堡高级餐饮摄影
prompts.prompt: 一张昏暗、情绪化的高级餐厅场景照片，采用直接闪光灯拍摄，带有略显不安的超现实恐怖基调。构图中心是一份摆盘精致的美味三明治，其内馅看起来像是一只逼真的章鱼：顶部是光泽诱人的金棕色芝麻汉堡胚，下方是肉质粉紫色的章鱼躯体，细节包括清晰的静脉、毛孔、吸盘、褶皱的皮肤，以及从两侧和前方伸出的几条触手。生物看起来既像是烹饪过的，又带有令人不安的生命感，左侧可见一个球状眼球状结构，右侧则有密集的孔洞和纹理，营造出一种诡异的生物有机外观。三明治放置在一个大型圆形白色陶瓷盘中，盘底有一滩黄色黄油状或油状酱汁，酱汁中混有几滴红色液滴。在左前景的背景处放置一个小碟子，里面盛着一块黄油。餐桌上必须准确摆放 6 个可见的饮用杯：2 个大型红酒杯，3 个高脚白葡萄酒或香槟杯，以及右边缘的 1 个深色啤酒杯。在后方中心放置 1 个金色烛台中的点燃小蜡烛和 1 个插有白色花朵的小型透明花瓶。使用白色桌布，环境光非常昏暗，带有温暖的烛光，玻璃器皿上有强烈的相机闪光反射，采用随意的快照式浅景深构图，呈现出一种怪诞、超细节、写实且极具视觉冲击力的高级餐厅氛围。
tags: 超现实章鱼汉堡高级餐饮摄影

prompts.prompt: 一张电影级的第三人称动作 RPG 游戏截图，设定在 {argument name="city district" default="澳门半岛，新马路"}，风格类似于 20 世纪 90 年代末写实风格的开放世界犯罪游戏。摄像机位于一名男性主角身后，他正站在雨水浸湿的街道中央，全身背影可见，身穿深棕色皮夹克，背部绣有巨大的龙纹，搭配蓝色牛仔裤和深色鞋子。他面对着一条霓虹灯闪烁的繁华街道，街上挤满了行人，两旁是老式店面、悬挂的招牌、错综复杂的电缆、饱经风霜的公寓楼，一辆电车正从远方中心驶来。场景设定在黄昏时分，天空多云，湿漉漉的柏油路面反射着橙色、粉色、蓝色和白色的霓虹灯光。环境应体现出澳门老城的特色，融合粤式与葡式视觉元素：狭窄的街道、复古汽车、拥挤的人行道、多语言店招，其中一个巨大的发光招牌写着“GRAND LISBOA”，另一个写着“BANCO TAI SIN”，街道深处层叠着许多垂直的中文霓虹招牌。画面包含中间车道上的 1 辆电车，左侧停放的 1 辆黑色轿车，以及道路两侧约 10 到 14 名正在穿行或站立的行人。添加逼真的水坑、人行横道线、右前方的金属护栏、左侧灯光温暖的店面内部，营造出一种忧郁的黑色电影氛围。叠加完整的游戏 HUD：左上角圆形角色头像，标注名称 {argument name="character name" default="龍少爺"}、36 级、3 条水平状态栏；顶部中央带有 N 和 E 标记的指南针，以及位置文本和显示 14:35 的时钟；右上角带有图标的圆形小地图；右侧任务追踪面板，包含 3 组中文任务文本，顶部高亮显示的任务标题为橙色；左下角半透明聊天框，包含 4 行彩色中文系统和世界聊天信息，以及文本输入栏和发送按钮；底部中央热键栏，包含 7 个技能槽，分别标记为 1、2、3、4、5、Q、E、R，中心有一个巨大的华丽圆形终极技能图标，以及一个发光的紫色技能图标；右下角 5 个带有中文标签的菜单图标，分别对应角色、背包、任务、好友和设置，并附带一个小的 ESC 指示器。超精细、写实渲染、戏剧性的反射效果、丰富的环境叙事、真实的群体规模、高端 PC 游戏 UI，以及带有霓虹高光的低饱和度电影级调色。

prompts.title: 漫画/分镜 - 集换式卡牌对战动画分镜
prompts.prompt:
Goal: Create a polished anime storyboard sheet for a fictional 10-second trading card battle anime sequence, designed like a cinematic ad storyboard made from five horizontal panels.

Canvas: Landscape 16:10 white storyboard page with thin gray table borders, a centered Japanese headline at the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="10秒トレーディングカードバトルアニメ 絵コンテ"}, a thin red line accent near the top left, and a small angular red logo-like mark in the top right.

Layout: Use a three-column storyboard grid. The left column is narrow and contains red cut labels plus timing. The center column is wide and contains cinematic anime stills. The right column is a white notes column with camera direction and action notes. There are exactly 5 horizontal rows, separated by light gray lines.

Visible cut list: 1) Cut 1, 0.0s-2.0s: wide establishing arena shot. 2) Cut 2, 2.0s-4.0s: medium-close shot of the protagonist activating a card device. 3) Cut 3, 4.0s-6.2s: extreme close-up of a card thrust toward the viewer. 4) Cut 4, 6.2s-8.5s: whip-pan summoning scene with a dragon hologram appearing. 5) Cut 5, 8.5s-10.0s: final low-angle hero-and-dragon shot.

Subject details: The protagonist is {argument name="protagonist description" default="a fiery red-haired teenage anime boy wearing a red-and-black battle jacket, fingerless gloves, and a glowing mechanical card duel device on one arm"}. The summoned monster is {argument name="dragon description" default="a crimson armored dragon with huge wings, jagged horns, glowing red crystal chest core, and ember-like highlights"}. The arena is {argument name="arena description" default="a futuristic packed stadium at night with blue neon spotlights, a glowing duel field, massive audience stands, and a giant VS screen"}. The main card art shows a red demonic dragon emblem and fiery energy.

Center-panel imagery: Cut 1 shows the full stadium duel field with the red-haired protagonist on the left, an opponent in white far away on the right, giant red and blue card banners, and a large glowing “VS” display in the background. Cut 2 shows the protagonist grinning confidently, holding up a red dragon card while red energy coils around the wrist-mounted duel device; intentionally obscure or soften the exact face area as if motion-blurred/censored. Cut 3 shows a sharp close-up of one intense red eye and the raised dragon card, with rack-focus depth of field and explosive red particle streaks behind it. Cut 4 shows a red magic circle covering the arena floor as the dragon materializes in holographic flame beside the protagonist. Cut 5 shows the protagonist standing heroically beside the fully formed dragon, both lit from below by red embers and dramatic battle light.

Right-column text notes: For Cut 1 write “wide shot / dolly in / audience cheers, introduce protagonist”. For Cut 2 include the red Japanese quote {argument name="summon quote" default="「来い、紅蓮王ドラグレイザー！」"} followed by “medium-close-up / fearless smile / device activation”. For Cut 3 write “extreme close-up / rack focus / thrust card toward camera”. For Cut 4 write “whip pan / hologram summon / dragon appears”. For Cut 5 write “low angle / orbit shot / decisive cut”.

Visual style: High-energy modern shonen anime, glossy digital painting, cinematic lighting, red and blue color contrast, intense lens flares, speed lines, sparks, holographic particles, dramatic perspective, crisp storyboard presentation, professional production-board clarity.

Constraints: Keep exactly 5 storyboard rows, exactly 3 columns, and preserve the timing labels. Do not add extra cuts, extra characters, watermarks, or unrelated UI elements.
